name: docstar
description: DocStar queries Markdown document graphs, IDs, dependencies, task context, and structural diagnostics.

interface.shortDescription: Query and verify Markdown documentation graphs.
interface.longDescription: Query Markdown document relationships, definitions, references, task context, and structural diagnostics without a persistent index or model calls.
defaultPrompt: Use DocStar to inspect this project's document dependencies.
Use DocStar to check this documentation tree before handoff.
用 DocStar 获取这张任务卡的精确上下文。
